summary: Frontend testing for offline data deduplication bug fix completed successfully. All features working correctly: 1) Predios load without duplication (3234 total), 2) Construcciones load from cache (6912), 3) Offline Ready indicator shows correctly, 4) Counter values match expected values. No data duplication observed.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED FIX: VisorActualizacion.js lines 702-712 - Deduplication of predios by codigo_predial when loading from offline cache
VERIFIED FIX: VisorActualizacion.js lines 795-809 - Deduplication in fallback offline loading path
VERIFIED FIX: VisorActualizacion.js lines 717-729 - Construcciones loading from offline cache with getConstruccionesOffline()
VERIFIED FIX: offlineDB.js lines 223-231 - savePrediosOffline uses Map to deduplicate by codigo_predial before saving
VERIFIED FIX: offlineDB.js lines 237 - Uses proyectoId consistently as prefix for ID generation
VERIFIED FIX: offlineDB.js lines 537-579 - saveConstruccionesOffline saves GeoJSON as single record per project
context_for_next_testing_agent: Offline data deduplication bug is fixed. The visor loads 3234 predios, 6076 geometrias, and 6912 construcciones without duplication. IndexedDB stores are properly populated. The Offline Ready indicator works correctly.

deduplication_logic.details: Progressive loading shows correct incremental counts: 500 → 1000 → 1500 → 2000 → 2500 → 3000 → 3234. No inflation observed.
